title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY at 159.43 — approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: EUR/USD
text: Fed-ECB 175bp differential weighs on EUR/USD — pair holds at 1.1763.

title: AUD/USD
text: RBA hiking rates — AUD carry supported; AUD/USD consolidating above 0.7097.

title: USD/JPY Correlation Break
